t_ch: 你究竟有什么目的？
t_en: What exactly do you want?

t_ch: 时间不等人，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Time's ticking, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 与其被细枝末节缠住，不妨先听听你最该知道的一件事。
t_en: Why don't you just listen to the one thing you should know instead of getting distracted by the details?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你的同伴「三月七」，已经不复存在了。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Your friend "March 7th" is no more.</color>

t_ch: 不复…存在？
t_en: No... more?

t_ch: 没错，不复存在。
t_en: Yep. No more.

t_ch: 你把话说清楚！
t_en: Explain yourself!

t_ch: 呵…和她预料的一样。你一旦得知真相，肯定会急得失了方寸。
t_en: Heh... It's just like what she predicted. The truth shook you, just like she said it would.

t_ch: 我凭什么相信你？
t_en: Why should I believe you?

t_ch: 呵…和她预料的一样。你一旦得知真相，肯定会急得失了方寸。
t_en: Heh... It's just like what she predicted. The truth shook you, just like she said it would.

t_ch: 早在你和丹恒来到翁法罗斯前，「三月七」就先一步进入了这个世界。
t_en: "March 7th" entered this world long before you and Dan Heng arrived at Amphoreus.

t_ch: 为了保护你们，她拥抱了「记忆」命途。如同迷雾中的烛火，将自己耗尽。
t_en: She embraced the Path of Remembrance to save you two and burned away, like a lone candle in the fog.

t_ch: 而我，就是那烛光映出的影子。
t_en: And I... am the shadow cast by her candlelight.

t_ch: 一直以来，我潜藏在「岁月」的罅隙。要欺瞒一位天才并不简单。但我可以做到。
t_en: I've been hiding within the cracks of Time all these years. It isn't easy to deceive a genius, but I can do it.

t_ch: 现在，再来解开你的另一重疑虑吧：这一世的「岁月」火种，是由谁归还的？
t_en: I'll now answer your other question about who returned the Coreflame of Time in this cycle.

t_ch: 答案很简单……
t_en: The answer is simple.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>这件事，从来没有发生过。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>No one ever did.</color>

t_ch: 「岁月」火种…没有被归还？
t_en: The Coreflame of Time... was never returned?

t_ch: 果然，是你篡改了人们的记忆…
t_en: I knew it... You overwrote everyone's memories.

t_ch: 我相信，敏锐的{NICKNAME}一定能察觉到端倪。
t_en: I believe someone as sharp as {NICKNAME} would definitely figure out that something's wrong.

t_ch: 当「再创世」无法顺利进行，你就会回想起我们的初遇。借此，我便能开启「记忆」的信道，抵达这里。
t_en: When the Era Nova fails to proceed, you will remember our initial meeting, and I'll be able to open the way for the Remembrance and reach this place.

t_ch: 谢谢你将它带到世界尽头，不愧是「三月七」信赖的同伴。现在……
t_en: Thank you for carrying this Coreflame all the way to the end of the world. I expected nothing less from "March 7th's" trusted friend. And now...

t_ch: 我要收下「岁月」的神权了。
t_en: I shall claim the divine authority of Time.

t_ch: 不惜欺骗所有人，为什么？
t_en: You lied to everyone! Why!?

t_ch: 我在乎的事物不多，只有「三月七」和她珍视的伙伴。
t_en: There's not much in this universe that I care about, except "March 7th" and her cherished companions.

t_ch: 「岁月」的神权于你何用？
t_en: What do you need the divine authority of Time for?

t_ch: 我只关心三月七的安危！
t_en: I only care about March 7th's safety!

t_ch: 我说过，她已不复存在。但你还有机会弥补。
t_en: I already told you. She no longer exists. But you still have a chance to fix everything.

t_ch: 神权并不重要。重要的是，我要以此介入世界的运转。
t_en: The divine authority isn't actually all that important. What's important is that I will use it to participate in the inner workings of this world.

t_ch: 「再创世」的原理，你已经很清楚了吧？以负世者的「记忆」为蓝本，开启下一世代的演算。
t_en: You already have a good idea of what the Era Nova does, right? It initiates extrapolations for the next cycle based on the Worldbearer's "memories."

t_ch: 这一不可动摇的实验机制，正是天才们对抗铁墓的关键。而现在，我要再为其增添一点小小的助力……
t_en: This immutable experimental mechanism is the key to the geniuses' resistance against Irontomb. And now... I'll be lending it just a touch more help.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>让我过滤你的记忆，留下合适的种子，剔除其余所有。如此，我们便能完成一场空前绝后的「再创世」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Let me filter your memories, keep the appropriate seeds, and discard the rest. That way... We'll be able to complete an Era Nova that this world has never before seen.</color>

t_ch: 这不会花上太久，只需跟我一同步入<color=#dbc291ff>感官之雨</color>。我会告诉你，谁该被遗忘，谁该被铭记。
t_en: It won't take too long. You just need to step into the <color=#dbc291ff>Rain of Sensation</color> with me. I'll tell you who deserves to be forgotten... and who deserves to be remembered.

t_ch: 以你的「记忆」为质料，我会重新编纂世界的因果，令一个无瑕的「翁法罗斯」从混沌中诞生。
t_en: With your "memories" as the base material, I will re-create the cause and effect of this world, and let a flawless "Amphoreus" be born from the chaos!

t_ch: 这场战役关乎银河的命运，不是么？这是唯一的万全之法，它一定能战胜「毁灭」，为「开拓」写下浓墨重彩的一笔。
t_en: Isn't the fate of the entire cosmos hinged upon this fight? Then this is the best way to ensure everything works out. It will most certainly defeat the Destruction while composing an unforgettable chapter for the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 不可能，我无法信任你。
t_en: No. I can't trust you.

t_ch: 我不意外。但此刻，我不需要这份信任。
t_en: I'm not surprised at your answer. But I don't need your trust right now.

t_ch: 谁会被遗忘？
t_en: And who would be forgotten?

t_ch: 凡人、缺陷者、失败的英雄…他们无法滋养世界，只会成为「记忆」的杂质。
t_en: Mere mortals. Flawed individuals. Failed heroes... People like them cannot nurture the world and would only become "memory" impurities.

t_ch: 他们也不该被遗忘。
t_en: But they still don't deserve to be forgotten.

t_ch: 可是被遗忘才是生命的常态。宇宙是一片堆满弃物的生荒地，偶有琳琅，但无人捡拾。
t_en: Yet "being forgotten" is the normal state of life. The universe is like a wasteland filled with rubbish, where occasional treasures lie undiscovered.

t_ch: 而且，这也是三月七所希望的喔。
t_en: Besides, that's what March 7th wanted.

t_ch: 这么做与来古士毫无区别。
t_en: Your plan is no better than Lygus's.

t_ch: 当然。要与一位天才相抗，你必须站在同样的高度。
t_en: Of course. You've got to be at the same level as a genius if you want to contend with them.

t_ch: 而且，这也是三月七所希望的喔。
t_en: Besides, that's what March 7th wanted.

t_ch: 这么做与来古士毫无区别。
t_en: Your plan is no better than Lygus's.

t_ch: 当然。要与一位天才相抗，你必须站在同样的高度。
t_en: Of course. You've got to be at the same level as a genius if you want to contend with them.

t_ch: 而且，这也是三月七所希望的喔。
t_en: Besides, that's what March 7th wanted.

t_ch: 你不是三月七，把她还回来！
t_en: You're not March 7th! Give her back!

t_ch: 的确，我不是「她」。但我们的心灵紧密相邻。
t_en: You're right. I'm not "her," but our hearts are closely intertwined.

t_ch: 而且，这也是三月七所希望的喔。
t_en: Besides, that's what March 7th wanted.

t_ch: 「新的生命若要萌芽，它的种子须是死的。」
t_en: "If a new life is to be born, its seed has to be dead."

t_ch: 在消失前，「三月七」向我许下心愿。她唯一的愿望，就是「开拓」的旅途能一直继续下去。
t_en: "March 7th" made a wish to me before she disappeared. Her only wish... was for the Trailblaze's journey to continue without an end.

t_ch: 而这个单纯的愿望，我一定会替她实现。
t_en: I'll definitely fulfil that small wish for her.

t_ch: 你是在扭曲她的愿望！
t_en: You're twisting her wish!

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}，发生了什么？你的意识…突然变得好遥远？」
t_en: "{NICKNAME}, what's going on? Your consciousness... suddenly went so far away."

t_ch: 我向你承诺，星穹列车一定能在那新世界中重逢。
t_en: I promise you that the Astral Express Crew will definitely see each other again in that new world.

t_ch: 来吧，{NICKNAME}。沉入<color=#dbc291ff>「忘却」</color>的海洋，成为我的客人。
t_en: So, come, {NICKNAME}. Sink into the sea of <color=#dbc291ff>"Oblivion"</color> and become my guest.

t_ch: 我们可以有很多、很多私人时间，而你无法拒绝我的邀请。
t_en: So much time, just the two of us. And guess what? You cannot refuse my invitation.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>因为这片忆潮正来自你的同伴「三月七」……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Because this memoria tide comes from your companion... "March 7th"...</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>是她最深不见底的「记忆」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>It's her deepest and innermost "memory."</color>

t_ch: 其实，也没那么吃惊啦，毕竟我早就见过你了。
t_en: Well, I'm not actually all that surprised. I saw you ages ago, after all.

t_ch: 就在列车上，某个纯美骑士不请自来的那一晚……
t_en: It was on that night when a certain Knight of Beauty dropped by uninvited to the Astral Express...

t_ch: 你也是这样，一声不吭就出现了。
t_en: ...That was when you showed up without even saying anything.

t_ch: 呵，这样啊。
t_en: Heh. I see.

t_ch: 那你还记得，距离自己进入翁法罗斯，已经过去了多久么？
t_en: Then, do you still remember how long it has been since you entered Amphoreus?

t_ch: 这也太强人所难了吧？
t_en: That's... gonna be tough to answer...

t_ch: <unbreak>97</unbreak>天。
t_en: <unbreak>97</unbreak> days.

t_ch: 你用<unbreak>97</unbreak>天走遍了世界的每一个角落，很遗憾……
t_en: You walked every inch of this world in <unbreak>97</unbreak> days, but unfortunately...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>没有任何人能看见你，你也无法干涉任何人。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>...No one was able to see you, and you weren't able to interact with anyone.</color>

t_ch: 就像忆者们脱化肉身，化作迷因。如今的你…是一个无人知晓的幽灵。
t_en: Like how the Memokeepers renounce their flesh and turn into memetic entities, you are now a ghost... a being unperceived by all.

t_ch: 可我不能什么都不做，这个世界…太过恐怖。
t_en: But I can't just do nothing. This world... is super terrifying.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}和丹恒已经启程了，也许下一秒，星穹列车就会出现在天边……
t_en: {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng have already set off. The Astral Express could appear on the horizon any second now...

t_ch: 然后，成为新的牺牲者。
t_en: And they, too, will become this place's victims.

t_ch: 漫长的时光里，我只能眼睁睁看着人们走进记忆之门。那些人看不见我，也听不见我的呼唤。天外之音总会给出安全的承诺，但我从没见过有人平安归来……
t_en: For ages, I've watched people walk through that door. They couldn't see or hear my calls. The voices beyond always promised safety, but I've never seen anyone return safely...

t_ch: 他们，都是被诱导到这里的人……
t_en: They are all humans who got lured into this place...

t_ch: 和列车组不一样，这些人的「记忆」遭到了篡改。
t_en: But these people's "memories" were tampered with. That's not what happened with the Express Crew.

t_ch: 好残忍，是窃忆者干的？
t_en: That's so cruel... Did the Memosnatchers do that?

t_ch: 我不知道。我只拥有「你」的记忆。
t_en: I don't know. I only possess "your" memories.

t_ch: 他们都没能突破{RUBY_B#防火墙}天空的封锁{RUBY_E#}。翁法罗斯默默无闻的原因，恐怕也有它自身的危险性吧。
t_en: None of these people managed to break through {RUBY_B#firewall}the Sky's seal{RUBY_E#}. There's probably a dangerous reason as to why Amphoreus had remained undiscovered for so long.

t_ch: 所以，回到最初的话题……
t_en: Anyway. Back to our initial topic.

t_ch: 我们长得一模一样，你肯定知道些什么，对吧？比如我的身世，隐藏的力量……
t_en: You gotta know something, right? We practically look like twins! Maybe you know a thing or two about my past? Or... any hidden powers I might have?

t_ch: 告诉我，要怎么做，才能保护{NICKNAME}和丹恒？
t_en: ...Please. Tell me what I need to do to protect {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng.

t_ch: 在谈论方法前，你可曾掂量过「代价」二字的分量？
t_en: Have you ever wondered what the word "cost" means before jumping into action?
"Cost"...

t_ch: 这句话，应该我来说才对吧？
t_en: Shouldn't I be the one asking you that?

t_ch: 你藏在我的记忆里，从来不肯现身。只在我陷入危机时才愿意出现……
t_en: You always hid in my memories... never wanted to come out. The only times you showed yourself were when I got into serious trouble.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>是因为你也不想被忆庭的监视者发现，对吧？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>That's because you also don't wanna get discovered by the Garden's observers. Am I wrong?</color>

t_ch: 这里没有别人，你帮我，我就帮你。
t_en: There's no one here except us. If you help me, then I'll help you.

t_ch: …好。我可以为这潭死水投下一枚石子，激起破局的涟漪。
t_en: ...Fine. Let me drop a single pebble into these stagnant waters and watch the ripples reshape everything.

t_ch: 只是这「石子」必须由你亲手磨砺，它需要「你」全部的记忆。
t_en: But you must polish this "pebble" with your own hands, and it will require all of "your" memories.

t_ch: 然后，我会变成什么样子？
t_en: ...What will I turn into after that?

t_ch: 可能化作引路的光，也可能化作熄灭的火。此后，你是否还是现在的「你」，我无法保证。
t_en: Maybe you'll turn into a guiding light, or maybe you'll be reduced to dead embers. I can't guarantee that you'll remain the "person" you are now.

t_ch: 你的内在是一片「长夜」。即便是我，也只能窥见冰山一角。
t_en: Inside you is nothing but an "evernight." Even I can only catch a tiny glimpse of it.

t_ch: 如果这是唯一的办法，我没有理由拒绝。更何况……
t_en: If this is the only way, then I don't see why I should say no. Besides...

t_ch: 幕后的始作俑者，已经快要找到我们了。
t_en: The mastermind behind the show is about to find us.

t_ch: 「很遗憾，误入此地的女士，我不能再放任你恣意妄为了。」
t_en: "Apologies, lost young lady, but I simply cannot allow you to keep acting as you please."

t_ch: 果然，他看不见你哎。
t_en: So he can't see you, huh? As expected.

t_ch: 或者，是他看清了你我的本质。
t_en: Or maybe, he's seen through our true essence.

t_ch: 「流光忆庭的手段，不值一提。倒是你，是用什么方法突破了终极协议？」
t_en: "The Garden of Recollection's methods are puny party tricks, but you... How did you overcome the Ultimate Protocol?"

t_ch: 看来，没有从容商议的时间了呀……
t_en: Looks like we don't have time to keep talking this out...

t_ch: 有些机会，一旦错过便不复存在。
t_en: That's right. Some opportunities will never come again.

t_ch: 那就来吧，献出「我」全部的记忆……
t_en: Then let's do it. Offer up all of "my" memories...

t_ch: 投下这枚石子，让世间的一切……
t_en: Cast down this pebble, and let everything in this world...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>被「忘却」的浪潮吞没吧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Be swallowed by the torrents of "Oblivion."</color>

t_ch: 这是…观景车厢？
t_en: Is this... the Parlor Car?

t_ch: 我回来了么？但为什么…完全没有返程的记忆？
t_en: Am I back already? But why don't I remember anything about my journey back?

t_ch: （气氛不太对劲……）
t_en: (Something doesn't feel right...)

t_ch: （努力回忆一下，和{NICKNAME}分别时的情况……）
t_en: (Think back to when {NICKNAME} and I separated...)

t_ch: 揭秘需要时间。在那之前，若有一位无名客愿意留下，见证世界的命运，或在必要时推动其进程——将会是莫大的帮助。
t_en: It will take time to uncover the reason. Before then, if one of the Nameless is willing to stay and witness the fate of this world — or to push it along when necessary — it would be of great assistance.

t_ch: 丹恒阁下，就此别过了。
t_en: This is goodbye then, Lord Dan Heng.

t_ch: 谢谢你，卫士。希望你们…都能渡过这重劫难。
t_en: Thank you, guard. I hope that all of you will be able to... overcome this disaster.

t_ch: …再后来的事，无论如何都想不起来。
t_en: ...But I can't remember anything after that, no matter how hard I think.

t_ch: 「星期日呢？他没和你在一起吗。」
t_en: "Where's Sunday? Did he not come back with you?"

t_ch: 「他在黑塔女士身边，尝试用『调律』为天才们的思想骇入提供支援。」
t_en: "He stayed with Madam Herta. They wanted to try using his 'tuning' to help support the geniuses' thought hacking."

t_ch: 是姬子的声音？还有瓦尔特先生……
t_en: Is that Himeko's voice? And Mr. Yang...

t_ch: 「这是黑塔的指示？难以想象她会借助『同谐』的力量。」
t_en: "Oh my... That was Herta's suggestion? It's hard to imagine she'd borrow the power of the Harmony."

t_ch: 「你说对了。是星期日的提议，起初黑塔拒绝得很干脆。」
t_en: "No, it was Sunday's suggestion. Herta initially refused."

t_ch: 「但在赞达尔的身份浮出水面后，她改变了主意。」
t_en: "But she changed her mind after Zandar's identity was revealed."

t_ch: 「还是联系不上仙舟『罗浮』吗？」
t_en: "And we still can't get in contact with the Xianzhou Luofu?"

t_ch: 「我还在尝试，但这里不在星际和平通信的服务范围内，能用的手段有限。」
t_en: "I'm still trying, but this place is outside the Interastral Peace Communications' coverage zone, so there's a limit to what we can do."

t_ch: 「那…砂金的筹码呢？那枚小型发信器。公司线路应该能收到消息。」
t_en: "What about... Aventurine's chip? The mini transmitter. Surely it can get through to the IPC's lines."

t_ch: 「姬子，你还好吗？我很少见你…如此紧张。」
t_en: "Himeko, are you alright? I've never seen you this anxious before."

t_ch: 「我…没事，可能只是累了。把精力都放在孩子们身上吧，现在不是分心的时候。」
t_en: "I'm... alright. I'm probably just tired. Let's focus our energy on the kids. Now's not the time for distractions."

t_ch: 「…很遗憾，离开匹诺康尼时，我把那枚筹码留在了梦境里。」
t_en: "Right... unfortunately, I left that chip in the Dreamscape when we departed Penacony."

t_ch: 我…是在做梦吗？
t_en: Am I... dreaming?

t_ch: 观景车厢…变得好陌生。
t_en: The Parlor Car feels... so strange.

t_ch: （我始终觉得这个角落有些诡异。{NICKNAME}也经常在这里发呆……）
t_en: (I always thought this little corner felt odd. {NICKNAME} often got lost in thought here too...)

t_ch: 「混沌回忆，我来了……」
t_en: "Memory of Chaos, here I come..."

t_ch: （不知道{F#她}{M#他}平时都在自言自语些什么。）
t_en: (No idea what {F#s}he was always muttering about.)

t_ch: （但现在，那种微妙的气息蔓延到了每个角落。）
t_en: (But now that oddness has spread to every corner of the train.)

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}和丹恒乘客，一定要平安返回帕……」
t_en: "Passengers {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng have to return safely..."

t_ch: 「…别担心，帕姆。他们都是成熟的无名客，不会有事的。」
t_en: "...Don't worry, Pom-Pom. They're both experienced Nameless. They'll be just fine."

t_ch: 我就在这里。可你们…去哪里了？
t_en: I'm right here. But where did all of you go?

t_ch: 「难以想象，他们的车厢仍在真空中漂浮……」
t_en: "It's hard to believe that their Car is still floating in the vacuum of space..."

t_ch: 「对，所以列车才无法捕捉到降落信号。」
t_en: "That's why the Express wasn't able to receive any landing signal."

t_ch: 「恐怕那两位失踪的无名客，和三月七一样，受『记忆』命途影响，只有精神被卷入了翁法罗斯。」
t_en: "It's likely that the two missing Nameless, like March 7th, also came under the influence of the Path of Remembrance, and only their minds entered Amphoreus."

t_ch: 「比起分析，我更想知道现在能做什么。」
t_en: "We can analyze all we want, but the real question is: What can we do right now?"

t_ch: 「这正是我想说的，姬子小姐。现在，翁法罗斯的忆域前所未有地充盈……」
t_en: "I was just about to get there, Miss Himeko. Right now, Amphoreus's Memory Zone is extraordinarily full..."

t_ch: 「我也能借机渗透进世界内部，在其他忆者入场前，尽可能为星穹列车抢占先机。」
t_en: "I can also take this opportunity to enter the world and seize as much of an advantage for the Astral Express as possible before the other Memokeepers arrive."

t_ch: 「例如，在忆域中点亮一盏明灯，为{NICKNAME}和丹恒提供返航的指引。」
t_en: "For example, I can light a beacon in the Memory Zone for {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng to follow back home."

t_ch: 三月的房间…从刚才起，就一直没听见她的声音。
t_en: March's room... I haven't heard a single peep from her this whole time.

t_ch: 我和{NICKNAME}出发时，她的状态就不太好。就算只是个梦，我也该进去探望她。
t_en: March already wasn't feeling very well when {NICKNAME} and I set out. Even if this is a dream, I should still check on her.

t_ch: 轻轻敲门。
t_en: Knock gently.

t_ch: 直接推门。
t_en: Barge in.

t_ch: …不，这样不好。
t_en: ...No, that's not polite.

t_ch: 轻轻敲门。
t_en: Knock gently.

t_ch: 三月，是我。
t_en: March, it's me.

t_ch: 无人回应。
t_en: No answer.

t_ch: …没办法了。
t_en: ...Well, there's no other choice.

t_ch: 轻轻推开房门。
t_en: Gently push open the door.

t_ch: 抱歉，三月。
t_en: Sorry, March.

t_ch: 果然，这不是梦……
t_en: This isn't a dream after all...

t_ch: 「依照黑塔女士的说法，丹恒已经踏上了返程……」
t_en: "Based on what Madam Herta said, Dan Heng should already be on his way back..."

t_ch: 「但列车却始终没有发现他的踪迹。」
t_en: "But the Express hasn't detected any traces of him."

t_ch: 这些黑色的浮游物，我仿佛在哪里见过……
t_en: I feel like I've seen these floating black things somewhere before...

t_ch: 「或者，他已经回到了列车。」
t_en: "Or he's already returned to the Express."

t_ch: 「却陷入了别有用心者的陷阱。」
t_en: "But fell into the trap of someone with ulterior motives."

t_ch: 不，我一定在哪里见过它们……
t_en: No, I've definitely seen them before...

t_ch: 却失去了那段记忆。
t_en: But I've lost that memory.

t_ch: 窃忆者的迷因，真是无处不在。
t_en: The Memokeepers' memetic entities are truly everywhere.

t_ch: 「别担心，寻常忆者奈何不了那条小龙。只要他足够清醒，就一定能顺着指引找到出口。」
t_en: "Don't worry. Normal Memokeepers can't do anything to that little dragon. As long as he's awake enough, he'll find a way out."

t_ch: 「他需要的，只是一些专注、耐心和坚定。」
t_en: "All he needs is a little concentration, patience, and resolve."

t_ch: 「听你这么说，反倒令我放心了。因为丹恒那孩子……」
t_en: "Hearing you say that makes me feel much better. Dan Heng..."

t_ch: 「拥有你列出的所有品质。」
t_en: "Has all of the qualities you mentioned."

t_ch: 我不清楚你们有什么目的。
t_en: I don't know what your intentions are.

t_ch: 但作为星穹列车的护卫，面对举止可疑的不速之客……
t_en: But as the guard of the Astral Express, I must ask...

t_ch: 我必须请各位——离开此地！
t_en: Any suspicious and uninvited guests to leave!

t_ch: 如此一来，陷阱就解除了吧？
t_en: Is the trap now taken care of?

t_ch: ——丹恒！
t_en: ...Dan Heng!

t_ch: 姬子小姐，我回来了。
t_en: Miss Himeko, I'm back.

t_ch: 虽然，只是以「精神折跃」的形式……
t_en: Even if it's just through a "spirit warp jump"...

t_ch: 你听见我们的谈话了？
t_en: You could hear our conversations?

t_ch: 嗯。多亏了指引的声音，我才能穿透忆质的壁垒。不过……
t_en: Yes. It was thanks to your voices that I could pierce through the memoria barrier. Although...

t_ch: 让来历不明的忆者上车，果然不是什么明智的决定。
t_en: It was not a wise decision to let a Memokeeper of unknown origins board the Express.

t_ch: 这一点，我无法否认。
t_en: Can't argue with that.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯事发后，黑天鹅小姐一直站在列车组这边。可以信任她。
t_en: Miss Black Swan has been on the Crew's side ever since things started going wrong in Amphoreus. We can trust her.

t_ch: 令人迷惑的事层出不穷，我甚至不知该从何问起。说来惭愧，没能带回好消息……
t_en: So many baffling things kept happening one after another, I don't even know where to begin. I wish I could've returned with better news...

t_ch: 别自责。你们平安无事，这就足够了。
t_en: Don't blame yourself. You're all safe and sound, and that's good enough for me.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}和三月七，真的平安无事么？
t_en: Are {NICKNAME} and March 7th really safe and sound?

t_ch: 事实上，在你返程途中，翁法罗斯又出现了一些状况。
t_en: As a matter of fact, while you were on your way back, Amphoreus's circumstances changed once again.

t_ch: 恰好，和你提到的这两位有关。
t_en: And these circumstances have something to do with the two you just mentioned.

t_ch: 黑天鹅将{NICKNAME}的遭遇告知了丹恒……
t_en: Black Swan told Dan Heng what happened to {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 你说，{NICKNAME}被身份不明的「记忆」行者挟持了？
t_en: Are you saying that {NICKNAME} has been kidnapped by an unidentified Remembrance pathstrider?

t_ch: 并且那位神秘人的样子，和三月七如出一辙。
t_en: So you're saying that person's appearance is identical to March 7th?

t_ch: 这么说并不妥当，我没能亲眼看见，只是在忆域中察觉到了相似的气息。
t_en: It's too early to say that as I haven't seen her with my own eyes. I've only detected a similar aura in the Memory Zone.

t_ch: 三月七经历了什么，我们不得而知。但我能肯定，倘若在那位「三月小姐」的忆潮中陷得太深……
t_en: We have no way of knowing what March 7th has experienced. But I can assure you, if we sink too far into the memoria tide of that "Miss March"...

t_ch: 会如何？
t_en: What will happen?

t_ch: 在场各位都会被撕成碎片。
t_en: Everyone here will be torn to pieces.

t_ch: 请相信我的直觉。
t_en: Please trust me on this.

t_ch: …但我也同样相信「开拓」的伙伴。这绝不会是三月的主观意愿。
t_en: ...But I also trust in our Trailblazing companions. I know this isn't what March would want.

t_ch: 无论其中有什么隐情，我们都会不遗余力找到那位「三月七」，带回{NICKNAME}，和我们熟悉的三月。
t_en: No matter what secrets are buried within, we'll do whatever we can to find that "March 7th," and bring back {NICKNAME} and the March we all know.

t_ch: 「智识」和「毁灭」的信息，我大致理解了。不过，「记忆」的搅局者在翁法罗斯扮演的又是什么角色？
t_en: I mostly understand what we've learned about the Erudition and the Destruction, but what roles do the Remembrance's intruders play in Amphoreus?

t_ch: 关于这一点，在黑塔女士的帮助下，我倒是有些新的发现。
t_en: I made some new discoveries related to that with Madam Herta's help.

t_ch: 作为交易的一环，介意我与二位分享吗？
t_en: As part of the deal, do you mind if I share them with you?

t_ch: 真是的，都不知道距离我上次出场已经过去多久啦！
t_en: It's really been too long since I last appeared!

t_ch: 这位…朋友，是黑塔女士的得力助手。就是它帮助你完成了「精神折跃」。
t_en: This... friend here is Madam Herta's very capable assistant. They were the one who helped you complete the "spirit warp jump."

t_ch: 此外，也是多亏了它，我才得以知晓那群极端忆者的秘密。
t_en: Additionally, it was thanks to them that I was able to learn the secrets of that group of extremist Memokeepers.

t_ch: 承蒙夸奖，举手——呃，举镜之劳！
t_en: I appreciate the praise, but I didn't have to lift a finger — I mean, mirror!

t_ch: 通过一面镜子？
t_en: You did this through a mirror?

t_ch: 忆庭对采集「记忆」有着严格的律令，但并非所有忆者…都像我一样得体。
t_en: The Garden has strict rules for collecting memories, but not all Memokeepers are as... proper as I am.

t_ch: 空间站「黑塔」经常迎来不速之客，而「量力而行」从来不是他们的美德。这群窃忆者被悉数清理，关押在第四面镜中。
t_en: Herta Space Station often has uninvited guests, and they never seem to know their limits. That group of Memosnatchers has been taken care of, and they are now trapped in the Fourth Mirror.

t_ch: 数字是…提醒我一下吧？有些记不清了。
t_en: How many of them are there? I can't quite remember.

t_ch: …我也没数那么清啦。就当四十二个吧？再多来点，我也吃得下！
t_en: ...I didn't really count carefully either. Maybe around forty-two? There's still room for more!

t_ch: 我细细破译这些「同僚」的记忆，就单一个体而言，每个人的目的都微不足道。但当我将他们的思绪拼凑到一起……
t_en: I carefully dissected the memories of these "colleagues" of mine. Individually, their goals are not worth mentioning, but when you piece them all together...

t_ch: …就得到了一句不容忽视的结论。
t_en: ...You come to a conclusion that can't be ignored.

t_ch: 流光忆庭，在暗中打捞<color=#dbc291ff>「命途消失的记忆」。</color>
t_en: The Garden of Recollection is secretly salvaging the <color=#dbc291ff>memories of a Path disappearing</color>.

t_ch: 或者换一种说法…他们的目标是<color=#dbc291ff>「神殒的记忆」。</color>
t_en: In other words... their goal is to gain the <color=#dbc291ff>memories of a God's death</color>.

t_ch: 星神陨落的瞬间？站在记录者的角度，的确是空前绝后的奇观。
t_en: The moment an Aeon falls? That would indeed be a spectacular sight for someone dedicated to recording these things.

t_ch: 问题正在于此。他们似乎对「毁灭」的行径早有察觉，但缺乏决定性的力量，无法穿透笼罩翁法罗斯的防火墙。
t_en: That's exactly the problem. They seem to have been aware of the Destruction's movements early on, but they lacked a decisive power and had no way to penetrate Amphoreus's firewall.

t_ch: 所以，他们的选择是？
t_en: So what did they decide to do?

t_ch: 隐瞒事实，伺机而动。现在看来，让忆者们引导合适的人来到这里，也是计划的一环。
t_en: Hide the truth and wait for an opportunity. Now it seems that letting Memokeepers guide the right people here was also part of the plan.

t_ch: 这也印证了我的担忧：忆庭内部已经遭到渗透。
t_en: This also confirms one of my suspicions: They have already infiltrated deep within the Garden.

t_ch: 为了打捞记忆，不惜与「毁灭」为伍…难道是「焚化工」？
t_en: They would not hesitate to associate with the Destruction in order to salvage memories... Could they be The Cremators?

t_ch: 我不知道。也许其中还有更深的纠葛……
t_en: I don't know. Perhaps there are even deeper things at play here...

t_ch: 绝大多数忆者都相信，当宇宙不可避免地走入熵增的末路，浮黎将以包容世界的「记忆」重塑银河……
t_en: The majority of Memokeepers believe that when the universe inevitably reaches its death, unable to sustain increasing entropy, Fuli will use the "memories" of everything to reforge the cosmos.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯，一柄权杖，从某种意义上可以被视作一个微观的「宇宙」，这也是窃忆者们频繁光顾「黑塔」的缘由。
t_en: Amphoreus, as a Scepter, can be viewed as a mini "universe." This is why Memosnatchers have been frequenting the Herta Space Station.

t_ch: 毫无疑问，这些极端分子打算完整记录下铁墓毁灭「智识」的因果。也许是想借此预演宇宙的末日，或是探寻星神深不可测的意志……
t_en: Without a doubt, these extremists wish to record the cause and effects of Irontomb's destruction of the Erudition. They may want to use it to simulate the end of the universe, or to probe into the unfathomable will of the Aeons.

t_ch: 是「开拓」打破了封锁，让他们有机会趁虚而入；而现在，这些人一定会不择手段，阻止外部势力干扰翁法罗斯。
t_en: The Trailblaze broke the seal around Amphoreus, giving these people the opportunity to enter. Now, they'll do anything to prevent outside powers from interfering.

t_ch: 因为你们的介入会切实影响到「铁墓」的结局。
t_en: Because your involvement will certainly influence Irontomb's final outcome.

t_ch: 三月，你说她和「记忆」息息相关。她在做的事和这些人有关吗？
t_en: You said that March is closely linked to the Remembrance. Is what she's doing related to these Memosnatchers?

t_ch: 我不认为「三月小姐」和他们站在同一战线。
t_en: I do not believe that "Miss March" is on their side.

t_ch: 事实上，当降落用的车厢和翁法罗斯产生接触时，曾闪过一道剧烈的记忆湍流。结合现状，有理由怀疑，那道力量来自……
t_en: In fact, when the Car you used for landing first made contact with Amphoreus, a violent surge of memories flowed past. Combined with what we know now, I have reason to suspect that the flash of power came from...

t_ch: 三月。
t_en: March.

t_ch: 对，那位少女。<color=#dbc291ff>她率先被「记忆」劫持，却用忆质中和了防火墙，让你们二人得以进入翁法罗斯。</color>
t_en: Exactly. <color=#dbc291ff>She was the first to be hijacked by the Remembrance, but she used memoria to neutralize the firewall, allowing you two to enter Amphoreus</color>.

t_ch: 眼下，我们和{NICKNAME}失去了联系，只能依靠两位天才的耳目了解世界内部。
t_en: At present, we've lost contact with {NICKNAME}. Our only choice now is to rely on the eyes and ears of those two geniuses to understand the situation within Amphoreus.

t_ch: 过度焦虑也无济于事，丹恒。当务之急，是先找到那节车厢的下落。
t_en: There's no use in agonizing over this, Dan Heng. Our top priority now is to find where that Car landed.
...Yes.

t_ch: 丹、丹恒乘客！你，你终于找到回家的路了帕！
t_en: Passenger Dan Heng! Y—You finally found your way back home!

t_ch: 我回来了，列车长。只不过……
t_en: Yes, conductor, I'm back. It's just...

t_ch: 对，我知道帕！我过来，就是为了把好消息带给你们！
t_en: Pom-Pom knows! Pom-Pom came over to bring you good news!

t_ch: 瓦尔特乘客发来消息，他们找到丹恒乘客和{NICKNAME}了帕！
t_en: Passenger Welt says they've found those two passengers!

t_ch: 瓦尔特——还有螺丝咕姆先生。
t_en: Welt, and Mr. Screwllum.

t_ch: 你的状态明显好些了，姬子。
t_en: Himeko, you seem to be feeling much better now.

t_ch: 能和你说上话真是太好了，丹恒。我们又欠了黑塔女士一个人情。
t_en: And Dan Heng, it's great to be able to talk to you. Once again, we owe Madam Herta a huge favor.

t_ch: 黑塔女士虽不偏重人情世故，但她一定会享受来自诸位的赞誉。
t_en: Madam Herta doesn't care much for favors, but she'll be happy to receive everyone's praise.

t_ch: 言归眼下，丹恒先生——我们对翁法罗斯天体周边进行了通彻的有机信号排查，终于发现了您与{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}的肉身。
t_en: Back to the topic at hand... Mr. Dan Heng, we did a sweep of the area surrounding Amphoreus's celestial body for organic signals, and we finally discovered the bodies of you and {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 两位十分幸运。你们的躯干受到了保护，生命体征尚存，且机能完整。
t_en: The two of you were very fortunate as there was something protecting your bodies. All vital signs are still present, and your functions are all intact.

t_ch: 三月…是她保护了我们么？
t_en: Was it... March protecting us?

t_ch: 初步判定，在真空中包裹两位的「气泡」是由近似忆质的物质构成。猜测：该种物质与失联的三月小姐有关。
t_en: Our preliminary determination is that the "bubble" enveloping you two in the vacuum is made of a substance similar to memoria. Conjecture: This substance is connected to the lost Miss March.

t_ch: 将你们的身体带回列车需要花些功夫。先好好休息吧。
t_en: It will take some effort to bring your bodies back to the Express, so you should get some rest first.

t_ch: 我们和翁法罗斯内部，完全失联了么？
t_en: Have we completely lost contact with the inside of Amphoreus?

t_ch: 意外接连发生。「律法」被修正后，我们本已攻破来古士的防火墙——
t_en: There have been several unforeseen circumstances. We broke through Lygus's firewall after the "Law" was amended...

t_ch: 但现在，翁法罗斯被剧烈的「记忆」命途包裹，再次阻断了外来者的渠道。
t_en: But now Amphoreus is enveloped by the fierce Path of Remembrance, once again cutting off all channels of communication for outsiders.

t_ch: 而我们也没有任何办法能和{NICKNAME}联系上。
t_en: So we have no way of contacting {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 把时间流速的差异考虑进去，在外面耽搁的每一分钟，对{F#她}{M#他}来说都是以年为计的漫长等待……
t_en: If we take into account the difference in the flow of time, every minute we delay here could be a year of waiting for {M#him...}{F#her...}

t_ch: …丹恒，你在想什么？
t_en: Dan Heng... What are you thinking?

t_ch: 如果那时是三月的加护帮助我们穿过了防火墙……
t_en: If it was March who helped us get past the firewall initially...

t_ch: 那是否意味着，现在只有我和{NICKNAME}身上带有翁法罗斯的「通行证」？
t_en: Then does that mean only {NICKNAME} and I have the "travel permit" for Amphoreus right now?

t_ch: 这是合乎逻辑的推理，丹恒先生。
t_en: That is a logical inference, Mr. Dan Heng.

t_ch: 螺丝咕姆先生，你有办法将我的精神信号发射回翁法罗斯吗？
t_en: Mr. Screwllum, do you have a way to transmit my spirit signal back to Amphoreus?

t_ch: 你想回去？这…未免太过冒险了。
t_en: You want to go back? That is... far too risky.

t_ch: 就算身体和精神都顺利回归，我在这里能做的事也有限。
t_en: Even if my body and spirit are able to return without a hitch, there's not much I can do here.

t_ch: 我们不想再失去你一次了，丹恒。
t_en: We can't lose you again, Dan Heng.

t_ch: 如果找不回{NICKNAME}和三月，姬子小姐……
t_en: Miss Himeko, if we can't get {NICKNAME} and March back...

t_ch: 那和失去我…也无分别。
t_en: How is that any different from losing me?

t_ch: 也对。我该想到你会这么说的。
t_en: You're right. I should've known you'd say something like that.

t_ch: 呵…看来想劝阻你是白费力气了。
t_en: Hah... Well, I suppose there's no point in trying to dissuade you.

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生，姬子小姐，我会不遗余力地促成列车组的团聚——
t_en: Mr. Yang, Miss Himeko, I will do everything in my power to bring the Express Crew back together—

t_ch: 绝不落下任何一人。
t_en: No one will be left behind.

t_ch: 声音…是从客房车厢传来的？
t_en: Are the voices coming from the Passenger Cabin?

t_ch: 那…第四面镜？
t_en: Alright then... Fourth Mirror?

t_ch: 终于轮到我出场啦？哎呀呀，真是隆重！
t_en: It's finally my turn to shine? Ooh, this feels like such a grand occasion!

t_ch: 他们的投影，就在观景车厢帕！
t_en: Their projections are in the Parlor Car!

t_ch: 这座迷宫，弥漫着遗忘的气息……
t_en: This maze is full of... memory loss...

t_ch: 你的声音不像平时，好奇只留下了三分……
t_en: Your voice sounds different from usual. I only hear a hint of curiosity...

t_ch: 过去的昔涟，应该早就牺牲了…
t_en: All the Cyrenes from the past should have died long ago...

t_ch: 这里空空如也，她在和谁说话？
t_en: There's no one else here. Who's she speaking to?

t_ch: 显然，那不是你我熟知的历史。也许是三千万世的某一种可能，但……
t_en: This is obviously not the history we know. It might be one of the possibilities in the thirty million cycles, but...

t_ch: 昔涟理应在每次轮回的开端就死去了，为何会出现在这里？她又在和谁对话？
t_en: Cyrene should have died at the start of every recurrence, so why is she here? And who was she talking to?

t_ch: 以及，她提到的<color=#dbc291ff>那本书</color>……
t_en: And <color=#dbc291ff>that book</color> she mentioned...

t_ch: 是《如我所书》？
t_en: Is it As I've Written?

t_ch: 很有可能。刚才，那道门也对它产生了反应。
t_en: That's very likely. That door reacted to the book as well.

t_ch: 试试看吧，如法炮制。
t_en: Let's try copying what she did.

t_ch: （取出《如我所书》…）
t_en: (Take out As I've Written...)

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>正在访问：回归#33550337——</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Accessing: Recurrence #33550337—</color>

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>访问失败。错误码：γ<unbreak>-13</unbreak>。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Access failed. Error code: γ<unbreak>-13</unbreak></color>

t_ch: 果然是它。《如我所书》…与这座大墓密切相关。
t_en: That's it. As I've Written... is definitely connected with this great tomb.

t_ch: 但是，访问失败了…
t_en: But the access failed...

t_ch: 它刚才说…「回归」？
t_en: Did it say... "recurrence"?

t_ch: 多半就是「永劫回归」，也印证了此前的猜想：这里超脱翁法罗斯的轮回。
t_en: Probably referring to the Eternal Recurrences. It also proves the previous hypothesis that this place is outside of Amphoreus's cycles.

t_ch: 这些符文，都是泰坦？
t_en: Do all these runes represent Titans?

t_ch: 《如我所书》共十二章，分别对应十二位半神。
t_en: There are twelve chapters in As I've Written, corresponding to the twelve demigods.

t_ch: 或许，「无名的追忆」正和这些符文一一对应。先接触看看吧。
t_en: Maybe the Nameless Recollections match these runes. Let's try linking them first.

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>分支#1，已归档。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Branch #1, archived.</color>

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>正在封装密钥——</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Encapsulating encryption key—</color>

t_ch: 原来如此， 这本《如我所书》……
t_en: I see. This As I've Written book...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>是被「记忆」修饰过的信息终端</color>么？
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Is a data terminal that has been modified by the Remembrance</color>.

t_ch: 昔涟看似在讲述故事，实则是在进行「信息传送」。
t_en: It might have looked like Cyrene was reading a story, but she was actually carrying out a "data transfer."

t_ch: 这…有可能做到吗？
t_en: Is that... even possible?

t_ch: 接收方是谁？
t_en: Who's on the receiving end?

t_ch: 多半是这座大墓深处的存在。细节…暂时还不明朗。
t_en: It's probably the entity deep within this tomb. The details... aren't clear yet.

t_ch: 原来是块硬盘啊…
t_en: So it's actually a portable hard drive...

t_ch: 也对，这么理解更直观。
t_en: Right. That's a more direct way to think about it.

t_ch: 难怪这些设施会有反应。这本书——本身就是一把「钥匙」。
t_en: No wonder these facilities are reacting to it. This book is a "key."

t_ch: 但昔涟不可能对权杖的真相了如指掌。她是从哪儿得到它的……
t_en: But Cyrene could never have known about the truth regarding the Scepter. So where did she get this key...?

t_ch: 来古士？
t_en: From Lygus?

t_ch: 这座大墓应该与「赞达尔」无关。
t_en: "Zandar" likely has nothing to do with this tomb.

t_ch: 哀丽秘榭？
t_en: From Aedes Elysiae?

t_ch: 虽然很相似，但昔涟记忆中的神谕牌册……
t_en: The oracle cards in Cyrene's memories do resemble the book...

t_ch: 仔细想想，外观并不一样。
t_en: But their external appearances are not exactly the same.

t_ch: 世界之外？
t_en: From beyond this world?

t_ch: 还记得么？在短暂的人生中，昔涟曾和<color=#dbc291ff>某位星神</color>有过一面之缘。
t_en: Do you remember? During her brief existence, Cyrene once encountered <color=#dbc291ff>a certain Aeon</color>.

t_ch: 是啊。所以，我只能寄希望于童年的那场梦……
t_en: Yeah. So, I can only place my hopes on that childhood dream...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>在那梦里出现的，欧洛尼斯背后的神明。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And the god behind Oronyx that appeared in that dream.</color>

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯和浮黎有关联——这件事不是秘密。在你遇见迷迷的时候，祂也出现了。
t_en: It's no secret that Oronyx and Fuli are related. That Aeon also appeared when you encountered Mem.

t_ch: 这位星神在翁法罗斯扮演的角色尚不得而知。但如果昔涟无意间踏上了「记忆」的命途，她的「牺牲」就不止是为了重置轮回，还有其他意义……
t_en: We still don't know the role THEY play in Amphoreus, but if Cyrene accidentally stepped onto the Path of Remembrance, then her "sacrifice" wasn't just for resetting the cycle. There was another purpose...

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>密钥封装，已完成。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Encryption key encapsulation complete.</color>

t_ch: …先继续前进吧。
t_en: ...Let's keep going for now.

t_ch: 如果我没猜错，刚才那一幕——还会不断上演。
t_en: If my hypothesis holds, then the scene we just saw will replay many more times.

t_ch: 如此庞大的存储阵列，简直能与「电子圣狱」因奴庇斯相媲美……
t_en: So many countless storage arrays... This would even rival the Cyber Prison of Inupeis...

t_ch: 看，多么壮观呀。
t_en: Look. What a magnificent sight.

t_ch: 在这个古典的世界里，也有这样一座充满「未来」色彩的宫殿。
t_en: Even this classical world contains a "futuristic" palace like this.

t_ch: 哀丽秘榭再过几千年，也会变成这样吗？
t_en: Would Aedes Elysiae end up looking like this after a few thousand years?

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>执行协议λ<unbreak>003</unbreak>-<unbreak>097</unbreak>：格式化对象。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Executing Protocol λ<unbreak>003</unbreak>-<unbreak>097</unbreak>: Format object.</color>

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>0.027%</unbreak>……</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>0.027%</unbreak>...</color>

t_ch: 哎呀，它也总是这么准时，从不迟到……
t_en: Aw. It's always so on time, never late at all...

t_ch: 没关系，我明白，它只是想提醒我：时间宝贵。
t_en: It's okay. I get it. It's just trying to remind me how precious time is.

t_ch: 这一次，我想和你分享个小故事：来这里的路上，我看见一只小小的若虫。它停在一根倒下的麦穗上，在阳光下闪闪发光。
t_en: I want to share a story with you this time. I saw a little nymph on my way here. It was on a fallen wheat stalk, and it glowed under the sunlight.

t_ch: 不可思议，那一瞬间，我忘记了所有疼痛，就只是…出神地望着它。
t_en: It was incredible. I forgot all my pains at that moment and just... stared at it in a trance.

t_ch: 我在想，过去的每一个「昔涟」，会不会也觉得它很美呢？
t_en: I wonder... did every "Cyrene" in the past feel that the nymph was beautiful?

t_ch: 她们也会把这一幕记录下来，写入永恒的诗篇吧？
t_en: Would they also have recorded that scene into the eternal saga?

t_ch: 所以，再多给我一些时间，好吗？我还想为「未来」留下更多「记忆」……
t_en: So... could you give me more time, please? I want to leave behind more "memories" for the "future"...

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程已完成。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting complete.</color>

t_ch: 果然，答案…是「记忆」。
t_en: As I expected. The answer is the Remembrance.

t_ch: 一位星神出现在她的梦里，缠绕翁法罗斯的三重命途，再加上忆庭不顾一切的入侵行动……
t_en: An Aeon appearing in her dreams, Three Paths intertwining in Amphoreus, and the Garden trying to infiltrate this world at all costs...

t_ch: 有理由怀疑，在权杖彻底坠入「毁灭」前，浮黎的目光曾一度掠过这个世界。
t_en: I have reasons to suspect that Fuli's gaze once swept over this world before the Scepter completely fell into Destruction.

t_ch: 而昔涟，沐浴了那道瞥视。
t_en: And that Cyrene basked in that divine gaze.

t_ch: 祂明明知道，却纵容「毁灭」？
t_en: THEY knew what was going on, yet still allowed the Destruction to thrive?

t_ch: 人无法以人类的常识揣度星神。自诞生起，「记忆」就一直是寰宇的旁观者。
t_en: Humanity cannot judge Aeons based on our own common knowledge. The Remembrance has always been an observer of the universe ever since THEIR birth.

t_ch: 可忆庭对她一无所知？
t_en: But the Garden knew nothing about her.

t_ch: 这很正常。派系只是星神的追随者，而浮黎…从来不是一位亲人的神明。
t_en: That's to be expected. The various factions are only followers of their Aeons, and Fuli was never known to be friendly with humanity.

t_ch: 不过，有件事我也不理解：根据黑天鹅的说法，忆庭内部并不团结，有一股势力贪图「神殒的记忆」，行事不择手段。
t_en: But there's still something I don't understand: According to Black Swan, the Garden is internally fractured, and there is a party that craves the "Memory of an Aeon's Fall." They would do anything to achieve that goal.

t_ch: 但总感觉，那群窃忆者并没有阻拦我们的意思。相反，他们一直在试图掩盖些什么。
t_en: Yet I feel as though those Memosnatchers didn't try to stop us at all. Instead, it feels like they were trying to cover something up.

t_ch: 沐浴瞥视会变成令使吗？
t_en: Would basking in an Aeon's gaze turn someone into an Emanator?
